since_last: 74% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.39%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 74% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.48% · BTC -2.57% · Gold +1.09% · Nasdaq100 +1.39%. 74% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.39%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.39%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.26%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +13.99%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +13.99%, AMBA +9.42%, VRT +8.37%, AMD +7.89%, TER +7.62%. Laggards: AVAV -3.87%, WDAY -2.80%, TTD -2.25%, RXRX -2.11%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.52% at $166.08
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.52% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
